title: post api auth register user registration
description: Test user registration with valid data to receive 201 Created and user id. Also test registration with already registered email to receive 400 Bad Request.

title: post api auth login user login
description: Test user login with valid credentials to receive 200 OK with JWT and refresh token. Test login with incorrect password to receive 401 Unauthorized.

title: post api auth refresh token refresh
description: Test token refresh with valid refresh token to receive 200 OK with new JWT. Test refresh with invalid or revoked token to receive 401 Unauthorized.

title: get api clients me get client profile
description: Test fetching current client profile with valid JWT to receive 200 OK with profile data. Test without authorization header to receive 401 Unauthorized.

title: put api clients me update client profile
description: Test updating client profile with valid JWT and valid payload to receive 200 OK with updated profile. Test with invalid payload to receive 400 Bad Request.

title: put api clients me avatar update client avatar
description: Test updating client avatar with valid JWT and multipart image to receive 200 OK with avatar URL.

title: post api dashboard create user create new user
description: Test creating a new user with admin JWT to receive 201 Created with new user id. Test with non-admin JWT to receive 403 Forbidden.

title: get api dashboard summary get dashboard summary
description: Test retrieving dashboard summary with valid admin JWT to receive 200 OK with summary data. Test with expired JWT to receive 401 Unauthorized.

title: get api dashboard audit logs get audit logs
description: Test retrieving audit logs with valid admin JWT to receive 200 OK with audit logs.

title: get api polls get polls list
description: Test retrieving list of polls without authentication to receive 200 OK with polls data.
